hobbies.title: Life Beyond the Whiteboard
hobbies.intro: Optimisation keeps the mind sharp. Everything below keeps the rest of me alive.
hobbies.cycling.label: Cycling
hobbies.reading.label: Reading
hobbies.guitar.label: Guitar
hobbies.cycling.lead: Munich is best experienced at 28 km/h. I ride year-round — solo early mornings on the Isar, and group rides with Accross Cycling Club Munich, where I serve as ride leader and help build the club's software infrastructure.
hobbies.cycling.stat.note: Stats are approximate annual averages — not excuses to skip the next ride.
hobbies.reading.lead: I grew up on wuxia and science fiction. The best books feel like they rearrange something inside you — a sentence you come back to years later and understand differently.
hobbies.reading.app: Currently reading on WeChat Reading (微信读书) — the best Chinese e-reader app, with decent annotation sync.
hobbies.guitar.lead: Acoustic guitar, mostly self-taught, mostly late at night. I've never composed anything — it's not about output. It's about the twenty minutes after a long day when my hands do something that doesn't involve a keyboard or a solver. Folk, fingerpicking, the odd Hesse-adjacent singer-songwriter mood. Still learning. Probably always will be.
